headline: Raymond James Financial Names Kirk Bell Independent Contractor Division President
summary: St. Petersburg, Fla., March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Raymond James today announced that Raymond James Financial Services Independent Contractor Division (ICD) Division Director Kirk Bell has been named president of ICD, effective April 1. In this role, Bell will join Raymond James’ Senior Leadership Team and the Private Client Group’s (PCG) Executive Leadership Team as he leads ICD’s efforts to deepen advisor partnerships and strengthen its growth trajectory. “Over his nearly 26 years with t

headline: The ‘Watchlist’ of Private Credit Loans Showing Stress Is Growing. What It Means.
summary: The December numbers on loan quality are in for most of the public funds, so  Raymond James  ’ Robert Dodd summed them up in a Wednesday report.  Despite the panic, troubled loans in public funds remain at low levels.  At nontraded funds—those reserved for the rich—defaults ticked up, but are far below the levels of the public funds or most banks.

headline: Expectations for the next Fed rate cut get pushed back after hot inflation report
summary: Futures markets took any realistic chance of a cut off the table until at least December.
